title: Brookfield India REIT is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Brookfield India REIT is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Property Advisor looking for your next big career move? Brookfield India REIT in Hyderabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Brookfield India REIT:
Brookfield India REIT is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Brookfield India REIT!
